metadata.description: The Newcomer Group's internal AI plugins for real estate agents.

plugins.name: newcomer-first-responder
plugins.description: Complete virtual ISA: the Smart List Manager works the agent's whole Follow Up Boss pipeline by smart list on a schedule — new-lead speed, follow-up, bailed-appointment recovery, and nurture — clearing automated lists while protecting Current Clients/Under Contract/Past Clients/Birthday/Closing Anniversary. Fello + HomeLight, opt-out safe, per-agent scoped. Runs on each agent's own Claude.
